name: Blitz 24x30 Garage Shed Plan - A Modern Garage with Transom Windows & Sleek Black Doors
open_features: A sleek single-pitch roof offers efficient drainage, visual simplicity, and standout architectural character ideal for modern homes.
Straightforward framing, clean roof geometry, and organized build plans make the Blitz an accessible project for both experienced builders and confident DIYers.
Gloss-black double garage doors provide smooth entry for vehicles, equipment, tools, bikes, outdoor gear, and workshop materials.
Light horizontal siding, transom-style windows, crisp white trim, and a strong black roofline create a clean, refined, modern-outbuilding design.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Blitz Garage Shed Plan - a 24x30 contemporary garage and workshop solution designed with crisp lines, modern architecture, and all-season durability. With its bold single-slope roof, clean horizontal siding, upper transom windows, and black-panel garage doors, the Blitz offers a striking, minimalist look built for today's homes. Whether you're creating a two-vehicle garage, a year-round workshop, a storage hub, or a creative project space, the Bli...
